news.headline: Matco Tools donates to Lincoln Foundation for Education to provide scholarships for transportation careers until 2028.
news.summary: Matco Tools has announced funding for a scholarship program that will run until 2028 to support students pursuing careers in transportation. The program will provide financial assistance to individuals undergoing training for transportation-related professions.

news.headline: Cyprus halts crypto applications before EU MiCA transition. CySEC warns providers of upcoming regulations as Europe prepares for MiCA.
news.summary: CySEC issues caution to crypto asset service providers regarding upcoming alterations, as Europe prepares for the Markets in Crypto-assets Regulation (MiCA).

news.headline: HUMBL secures US patent for blockchain payments tech.
news.summary: Last year, a record-breaking 2.5 million individuals in the country were affected by a data breach, which exposed their personal information. This breach resulted in financial losses totaling over $100 million. The cybersecurity breach was a result of a sophisticated hacking campaign that targeted various organizations, including government agencies and businesses. Authorities are investigating the incident and working to strengthen cybersecurity measures to prevent future breaches. The affected individuals have been advised to monitor their financial accounts closely and report any suspicious activity.

news.headline: Bitcoin falls below $67K as investors shift to stocks for profit. SEC's decision may favor BTC.
news.summary: Bitcoin saw a decrease from its recent high point as investors sought other investment opportunities, but a regulatory issue faced by the SEC could potentially work in favor of Bitcoin.

news.headline: Match Group will webcast Q3 2024 earnings conference call on Nov 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET).
news.summary: Match Group (NASDAQ: MTCH) announced a webcast for a conference call to discuss its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 7, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call comes after the market closes on November 6.

news.headline: Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation promotes David Lazowski after being named #1 in J.D. Power 2023 study for customer satisfaction.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on October 17, 2024, Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation, which was ranked as the top company for customer satisfaction in mortgage origination by J.D. Power in their 2023 U.S. Mortgage Origination Satisfaction Study, revealed the advancement of David Lazowski to a new position.

news.headline: Texas Instruments board declares $1.36 quarterly dividend for Q4 2024, payable Nov. 12 to shareholders of record on Oct. 31.

This dividend will be payable on November 12, 2024, to stockholders who are on record as of October 31, 2024. Texas Instruments is known for its leading innovations in the technology sector.

news.headline: UiPath to hold Investor Session at FORWARD + TechEd 2024 in Vegas on Oct 21, 2024, from 4-5pm PT at MGM Grand.
news.summary: UiPath, Inc., a prominent agentic automation and AI software company listed on NYSE under ticker symbol PATH, will be holding an Investor Session during its annual user conference, FORWARD + TechEd 2024. The Investor Session will include executives, a customer panel, and a live Q&A session. This conference aims to provide inspiration and valuable insights for attendees.

news.headline: South Plains Financial, Inc. raises quarterly cash dividend by 7% to $0.15/share, payable on Nov. 12 to shareholders as of Oct. 28.
news.summary: In Lubbock, Texas, on October 17, 2024, South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ:SPFI), the holding company of City Bank, shared plans for a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common stock share. This marks a significant 7% boost compared to the previous quarterly cash dividend announced in July 2024. Shareholders as of October 28, 2024, will receive the dividend on November 12, 2024.

news.headline: Wabtec (NYSE: WAB) declares a 20 cents/share quarterly dividend, to be paid on Nov 27, 2024, to shareholders on record by Nov 13.
news.summary: Pittsburgh-based Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB) recently declared a regular quarterly common dividend of 20 cents per share. The dividend is set to be paid on November 27, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 13, 2024. Wabtec Corporation, a prominent global provider in freight and transit rail industries, is focused on transforming transportation for upcoming generations through its equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services.

news.headline: Azamara Cruises to return to Alaska in summer 2026, offering intimate small-ship experience with unique excursions.
news.summary: Travelers are invited to explore the Last Frontier through a small-ship journey with Azamara Cruises. The cruise line, known for its Destination Immersion® and Extended Land Programs, offers guests an intimate experience in Alaska. The excursions provide authentic engagement with local activities and unique opportunities. The small-ship setting ensures a personalized and immersive adventure. This opportunity allows guests to enjoy the beauty of Alaska and create lasting memories. The news was announced in Miami on October 17, 2024.

news.headline: Oxipital AI will reveal its Visual AI platform at Global Produce & Floral Show in Atlanta - Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, in Bedford, Massachusetts, Oxipital AI, a prominent company specializing in artificial intelligence-powered visual inspection solutions, is set to introduce its cutting-edge Visual AI platform at the Global Produce and Floral Show in Atlanta. The event will take place at the Georgia World Congress Center.

news.headline: United Group's management arm, UPPM, named AMO of The Year by IREM®, recognized for excellence in property management.
news.summary: In Troy, New York on October 17, 2024, United Plus Property Management, LLC (UPPM), which is the management division of The United Group of Companies, Inc., was honored with the title of "Accredited Management Organization (AMO) of The Year" by the Institute of Real Estate Management (IREM®). The prestigious award recognizes UPPM's excellence in property management services.

news.headline: Quhuo Limited (Nasdaq: QH) complies with Nasdaq requirements, ensuring continued listing.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Quhuo Limited (Nasdaq: QH), a prominent gig economy platform for local life services in China, disclosed it was notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") about its compliance status. This confirmation from Nasdaq indicates Quhuo's standing with the market.

news.headline: Metallus (NYSE: MTUS) to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov. 7 after market closes, known for high-quality specialty metals.
news.summary: Metallus (NYSE: MTUS), previously TimkenSteel and a prominent provider of specialty metals, manufactured components, and supply chain solutions, will announce its third-quarter 2024 earnings on November 7, following the market's closure. The company, headquartered in Canton, Ohio, will present its financial performance for this quarter, showcasing its leadership in high-quality materials.

news.headline: Alpine Income Property Trust increased earnings, FFO, and AFFO in Q3 2024, with $0.21 per share income, $0.45 FFO, and $0.44 AFFO. Raised $11.1M in proceeds, acquired $37.5M in properties, sold $48.6M assets. Increased dividends to $0.28 per share and full year FFO guidance to $1.69 per share.
news.summary: Alpine Income Property Trust reported its earnings for the quarter ended September 30, 2024, with a Net Income per diluted share of $0.21. The company saw an increase in Funds from Operations (FFO) to $0.45 per diluted share, a 21.6% increase from the prior year. Adjusted Funds from Operations (AFFO) also increased by 15.8% to $0.44 per diluted share. The company raised $11.1 million through a common stock offering program and acquired four retail properties for $37.5 million. It also sold eight properties for $48.6 million, generating gains of $3.4 million. The company raised its full-year 2024 FFO guidance to a range of $1.67 to $1.69 per diluted share and AFFO guidance to $1.69 to $1.71 per diluted share. The company's property portfolio included 133 properties with an occupancy rate of 99.1% and an annualized base rent of $41.5 million. The portfolio had a weighted average remaining lease term of 8.8 years.

news.headline: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (NASDAQ:DMLP) announces $0.995785 per common unit distribution for Q3 2024, payable Nov 7.
news.summary: On October 17, 2024, Dorchester Minerals, L.P. disclosed its latest cash distribution for the third quarter of 2024. Each common unit holder (NASDAQ:DMLP) will receive $0.995785 as part of the distribution, reflecting the Partnership's activities from July 1 to September 30, 2024. news.headline: WD-40 Co. (NASDAQ:WDFC) reports Q4 net sales of $156.0 million, up by 11% from previous year.

news.headline: Reynolds Consumer Products increases revolving credit facility to $700 million with Wells Fargo. Maturing in 2029.
news.summary: In Lake Forest, Illinois, Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (Nasdaq: REYN) has revealed an update to its credit agreement. The company, known for household products, shared news of a new revolving credit facility through a group of banks led by Wells Fargo. They have replaced an unused $250 million senior secured revolving credit facility set to mature in February 2026, with a new unused $700 million senior secured revolving credit facility scheduled to mature in October 2029.

news.headline: Seaport Entertainment Group closes $175M rights offering (NYSE: SEG).
news.summary: In New York, entertainment company Seaport Entertainment Group Inc. (NYSE American: SEG) revealed the completion of a $175.0 million rights offering. This successful fundraising initiative holds significance for the company's financial future.

news.headline: Join live coverage of Netflix's Q3 earnings results with profit exceeding expectations and revenue surpassing estimates.
Students win $28.5M settlement against Walden University for predatory advertising, setting new precedent in for-profit education.
news.summary: A recent class-action lawsuit against a university resulted in a settlement of $28.5 million. This case has set a new precedent for addressing predatory advertising practices within for-profit education institutions.

news.headline: Docebo partners with Intercap to provide free e-learning to small charities and nonprofits in Canada and the US.
news.summary: In Toronto, Docebo Inc. (NASDAQ: DCBO; TSX: DCBO), a prominent learning platform provider rooted in AI and innovation, is working with Intercap Impact, a segment of Intercap Equity Inc., to establish OWL (Open World Learning Inc.). OWL is a no-cost e-learning platform tailored for small charities and nonprofits in Canada and the US. This collaboration marks the company's commitment to Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and aims to provide valuable educational resources to these organizations.

news.headline: Adams Natural Resources Fund reports 10.2% net asset value return, outperforming benchmark by 0.7%. Shares returned 16.3%.
news.summary: Adams Natural Resources Fund, Inc. (NYSE: PEO) has disclosed its performance results for the nine months ending on September 30th, 2024. During this period, the total return on the company's net asset value, including reinvested dividends and capital gains, reached 10.2%. In comparison, the company's benchmark, consisting of the S&P 500 Energy Sector (80% weight) and the S&P 500 Materials Sector (20% weight), recorded a total return of 9.5%. Additionally, the total return on the market price of the company's shares for the same period stood at 16.3%.

news.headline: Dropbox (NASDAQ: DBX) to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after market close, with conference call at 2:00 PM PT.

news.headline: Adams Diversified Equity Fund's 9-month results show 21.3% return on net asset value, behind S&P 500 at 22.1%. Market price up 24.9%.
news.summary: In Baltimore on October 17, 2024, Adams Diversified Equity Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ADX) reported its performance for the nine months ending on September 30th. The total return on Adams Diversified Equity's net asset value, reinvesting dividends and capital gains, stood at 21.3%. This surpasses the S&P 500's 22.1% and Morningstar U.S. Large Blend category's 20.4%. The total return on the market price of the Fund's shares during this period was 24.9%.

news.headline: Supernus reports positive results from Phase 2 study of SPN-820 for adults with MDD. #MajorDepressiveDisorder #supernus
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.2% in the past month, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.8%. The economy added 531,000 jobs in various sectors, exceeding economists' expectations. The labor force participation rate also increased to 61.6%, indicating more people actively seeking employment. These positive trends indicate a promising outlook for the country's job market and overall economy. Additionally, the report highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 0.4%, suggesting an improvement in wages for workers. The job gains were widespread, with notable increases in the leisure and hospitality, professional and business services, and manufacturing industries. Overall, the data reflects a strong recovery in the labor market and signals a positive trajectory for the nation's economic growth.

news.headline: Investcorp India Acquisition Corp changes name to Investcorp AI Acquisition Corp after shareholder approval.
news.summary: A company listed as Investcorp India Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: IVCA) declared a change in its corporate name to Investcorp AI Acquisition Corp post obtaining shareholder endorsement at an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on October 15, 2024. Following this nod, the company lodged an amendment to its Amended and Restated Memorandum and Articles of Association with the Cayman Islands Registrar of Companies to implement the new name. The alteration signifies a shift from the previous name to a new one aligning with its focus on AI technology.

news.headline: BILL (NYSE: BILL) to report FY Q1 financial results on Nov. 7, 2024, including revenue figures, closing market rates, and webcast details.
news.summary: San Jose, California - BILL, a prominent financial operations platform for small and midsize businesses (SMBs) trading on NYSE under BILL, is set to announce its financial performance for the fiscal first quarter concluded on September 30, 2024, post-market closure on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The company's Board foresees continuing to declare this dividend regularly in upcoming quarters, yet these declarations are dependent on Board approval and could be modified based on business circumstances.

news.headline: MGP Ingredients reveals preliminary Q3 2024 results; updates full-year guidance. Earnings conference call on October 31.

news.headline: iLearningEngines to showcase AI technology at ITC Vegas in October and Insurance Innovators Summit in Nov. #AI #insurance

This highlights the company's strategic focus on shaping the future of insurance through artificial intelligence technology. These events provide a platform for iLearningEngines to present its innovative solutions and thought leadership to industry professionals and stakeholders. The company's active involvement in these key conferences underscores its commitment to driving advancements in the insurance sector through AI.

news.headline: Fresh2 Group Ltd. facing delisting from Nasdaq for non-compliance with filing requirements; failed to submit required forms on time.
news.summary: In New York City, on October 17, 2024, Fresh2 Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: FRES), a B2B e-commerce and supply chain management company in the restaurant and food industry, disclosed that it received a Staff Determination Letter from Nasdaq. The letter, received on October 16, 2024, stated that Fresh2 did not meet Nasdaq's filing requirements under Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). This was due to Fresh2's failure to submit its Form 10-K for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2023, and its Forms 10-Q for the quarters ending on March 31 and June 30, 2024, within the specified deadlines.
